title: Floating Island Sunset
summary: Ghibli-style floating islands with cottages and waterfalls drifting through a warm sunset sky.
prompt: A breathtaking Studio Ghibli inspired landscape: several small floating islands drifting in a warm sunset sky. Each island has lush trees, tiny waterfalls cascading off the edges into clouds below, miniature wooden cottages with golden window light. Hot air balloon in the distance. Sky painted in dramatic peach, gold, and lavender. Painterly anime style, soft cel-shading, square 16:9 ratio. Sense of wonder and serenity.
